name: Sphere Game Epic
short_description: This is the 4th game released for xbox, now also available for Steam. Sphere Game Epic is the newest game in the Sphere game franchise. Game Created by Diego Paes
detailed_description:
This is the 4th game released for xbox, now also available for Steam.
Sphere Game Epic is the newest game of the "Sphere game" franchise with totally improved graphics and gameplay, pass the stage by controlling a lightly heavy sphere going through obstacles to earn coins and with new jumping and moving camera mechanics.

Features:

  • Camera with 3d perspective.
  • Skins for customizing the sphere.
  • Camera movement.
  • HDR.
  • Beautiful graphics.
about_the_game:

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian

reviews.review_text: This is pretty good. A little frustrating, but so was Marble Blast Ultra when I only had just enough motor skills to turn on an Xbox. That said, this game would benefit greatly from some input buffering for jumps. Not a whole lot, maybe a .03 seconds or so, but just enough to make it so that jump inputs aren't eaten by little things.

Game cost: $2
The real cost of the game: 2 dollars and a monitor.
10/10 I will play it again.
